00:11:42	Gajinder Singh:	this is very useful, great work!
00:22:22	Gajinder Singh:	in 2 subnet devnet system, zeam and ethlambda are aggregators on separate subnets. - just a small nit
00:23:02	Gajinder Singh:	aim is to have each client as an aggregator on one subnet - but multiple subnets in parallel

which should be next step
00:29:20	Gajinder Singh:	yes with "deconstruction" things look good to me to repack attestations

00:41:02	Yann Vonlanthen:	Replying to "So the chain will no..."

Exactly, running only the PQ heartbeat would remove justification / finalization, instead the heartbeat gives a confirmation signal, that works even if a majority of clients is offline.
